title: Robots that can tow 500kg: Dubai deploys AI-powered drones, aquatic rescue bots on beaches to enhance coastal safety
summary_full: Dubai is enhancing beach safety with new technology. Aquatic rescue robots and aerial drones are now assisting lifeguards. This system helps respond faster to emergencies at sea. The robots can reach swimmers quickly and tow them to safety. Drones provide aerial surveillance and deliver flotation devices. This integrated approach aims to prevent drowning and improve rescue efficiency for beachgoers.
